mapper.select: SELECT fm.*, ub.name FROM FRIEND_MESSAGE fm LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC ub ON fm.friend_user_id = ub.user_id WHERE fm.user_id = ${param1} ORDER BY fm.insert_dt DESC LIMIT ${param2}, ${param3}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS reciveMsg_count FROM FRIEND_MESSAGE WHERE USER_ID=#{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS reciveMsg_count FROM FRIEND_MESSAGE WHERE USER_ID=#{userId} AND READ_YN = 'N'
SELECT fm.*, ub.name FROM FRIEND_MESSAGE fm LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC ub ON fm.friend_user_id = ub.user_id WHERE fm.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}

SELECT fi.*, ub.name FROM FRIEND_INFO fi LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC ub ON fi.friend_user_id = ub.user_id WHERE fi.user_id = #{param1} AND ( fi.USER_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param2}, '%') OR fi.FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param2}, '%') OR ub.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param2}, '%') )
